note: Curated subset of Anthropic's official skills repository (ADR-015). Re-sync per release.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: Generate, edit, and extract content from PDF files

skills.name: docx
skills.description: Create and modify Microsoft Word documents

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description: Read, write, and analyze Excel spreadsheets

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Conduct rigorous code reviews on diffs, files, or whole modules

skills.name: git-worktree
skills.description: Manage parallel work via git worktrees, including cleanup

skills.name: test-writer
skills.description: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests for given code

skills.name: refactor-helper
skills.description: Identify smells, suggest refactors, apply them safely with tests

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Audit code changes for OWASP-style vulnerabilities and secrets

skills.name: data-analyst
skills.description: Analyze CSV/Parquet datasets, produce summary statistics and charts

skills.name: sql-builder
skills.description: Translate natural-language questions into SQL queries with explanations

skills.name: api-tester
skills.description: Build and run API tests against REST/GraphQL endpoints

skills.name: release-notes
skills.description: Generate release notes from git log, group by feat/fix/chore

skills.name: meeting-notes
skills.description: Summarize meeting transcripts and extract action items

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Search and discover other Claude skills across registries
